case_title: DONNA SPERO VS. JRL TRANSPORT INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPERO, DONNA AS TO DEFENDANT JRL TRANSPORT INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SPERO, DONNA AS TO DEFENDANT JRL TRANSPORT INC. WESTBROOKS, LONDON - CREW LEADER CARLSON, DON DIRECTOR OF QUALITY CONTROL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $87.50 SERVED MAY-06-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARLSON, DON DIRECTOR OF QUALITY CONTROL
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL(SC-152) - GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-08-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-02-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JRL TRANSPORT INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT JRL TRANSPORT INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JRL TRANSPORT INC. WESTBROOKS, LONDON - CREW LEADER CARLSON, DON DIRECTOR OF QUALITY CONTROL
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DON CARLSON ON 9/8/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT JRL TRANSPORT INC. WESTBROOKS, LONDON - CREW LEADER CARLSON, DON DIRECTOR OF QUALITY CONTROL

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DONNA SPERO. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS' REPRESENTATIVE JANE GRAYBILL, CLAIMS MANAGER AT PRIORITY MOVING, AND PRESENT ON BEHALF OF JRL TRANSPORT, INC., LONDON WESTBROOKS & DON CARLSON. DEFENDANTS' REPRESENTATIVE SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANTS JRL TRANSPORT, INC. & DON CARLSON. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON WESTBROOKS. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
